work_summary: Started working on improving the deployment workflow by analyzing the existing build and deployment process for the backend application. Evaluated how Docker containers could be used to standardize the runtime environment across development and staging systems. Created an initial Docker configuration to package the backend service along with its dependencies. Tested container builds locally and verified that the application could start correctly within the container environment while maintaining database connectivity and API functionality.
learnings: Developed a better understanding of containerization and how Docker helps create consistent runtime environments across systems. Learned how packaging dependencies inside containers eliminates configuration drift between development and deployment environments.

work_summary: Worked on setting up a basic continuous integration pipeline to automate testing and container builds whenever code changes are pushed to the repository. Configured automated build steps to install dependencies, run backend tests, and generate Docker images. Ensured that pipeline stages fail safely when errors occur so that broken builds do not proceed to deployment stages. Conducted multiple test commits to validate that the CI process correctly detects issues and builds containers reliably.
learnings: Learned the importance of continuous integration in maintaining code quality and preventing unstable builds from reaching deployment environments. Improved understanding of automated build pipelines and how they integrate with containerized applications.

work_summary: Integrated object storage support using AWS S3 for handling static assets and uploaded documents within the application. Configured secure access policies and implemented backend logic to upload and retrieve files from the storage bucket. Updated the application configuration so that media files are stored externally instead of on the application server. Conducted tests to ensure correct upload handling and verified that stored files could be retrieved securely through the backend API.
learnings: Gained practical exposure to cloud object storage and learned how external storage services such as AWS S3 improve scalability and reliability for file management in web applications.

work_summary: Enhanced the deployment pipeline by connecting the continuous integration process with container deployment workflows. Configured automated steps that push newly built Docker images to the deployment environment after successful builds. Ensured environment variables and secrets were properly managed during deployment to avoid exposing sensitive information. Performed test deployments to confirm that application updates could be released with minimal manual intervention.
learnings: Improved understanding of continuous delivery concepts and learned how automated deployment pipelines reduce operational overhead and improve release reliability.

work_summary: Focused on improving monitoring and reliability of the deployment setup. Reviewed container logs and implemented structured logging to make debugging easier during deployment failures. Tested rollback procedures by deploying previous application versions to ensure system recovery could be performed safely if new releases introduced issues. Updated documentation describing the deployment pipeline and operational procedures.
learnings: Learned how operational observability and structured logging play an important role in maintaining production systems. Gained experience planning safe deployment rollback strategies.

work_summary: Conducted a final review of the CI/CD pipeline and deployment workflow to ensure stability and repeatability. Verified that Docker builds, automated tests, and deployment stages function correctly together. Performed end-to-end deployment testing to confirm that updates propagate successfully from code commit to running application instance. Documented the finalized workflow for future team members and ensured configuration settings were clearly organized.
learnings: Developed a comprehensive understanding of the complete CI/CD lifecycle from source code changes to deployed application. Learned how automated pipelines, containerization, and cloud services combine to create reliable deployment processes.
